notes: Captures live giftCardCreate and giftCardUpdate behavior for templateSuffix values with a leading gift_card. prefix.
Shopify strips exactly the literal leading gift_card. prefix, returns the stripped suffix in mutation payloads, and downstream reads expose the stripped value.
Setup creates one disposable gift card with a run-unique code; cleanup deactivates the setup gift card.

setup.label: templateSuffixPrefixCreate

update.label: templateSuffixPrefixUpdate

readAfterUpdate.label: readAfterTemplateSuffixPrefixUpdate

cleanup.label: cleanupDeactivate:templateSuffixPrefixCard
